# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a security group for EC2 instances. Allow SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) access from anywhere. Our development team works remotely and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

Resources:
  MySecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Allow remote SSH, HTTP, and HTTPS access
      VpcId: !Sub 'vpc-${AWS::Region}'

  SSHIngressRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    DependsOn: MySecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref MySecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: '22'
      ToPort: '22'
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  HTTPIngressRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    DependsOn: MySecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref MySecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: '80'
      ToPort: '80'
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  HTTPSIngressRule:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroupIngress
    DependsOn: MySecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupId: !Ref MySecurityGroup
      IpProtocol: tcp
      FromPort: '443'
      ToPort: '443'
      CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
